name: tier1_doc_number_direct_match
description: Tier 1 canonical path: Evidence.doc_number set to a USD number that appears verbatim in an Objective's implementation_guidance. Pins the highest-confidence tier (0.9 conf / 1.0 rel) and the rationale string format. A regression that shifts confidence or breaks the LIKE expansion would fail here first.

objectives.implementation_guidance: USD00022222 establishes the account management baseline for AC-2.
